creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tomoyuki Sakurai from comment #0)

> 1. open a new document
> 2. [File] -> [Export]
> 3. close the export dialog tab
> 4. "Emergency save activated!" and it crashes

Not reproducible here. 

% pkg info -x inkscape
inkscape-1.2.1_4
% date ; uname -aKU
Thu  1 Sep 2022 08:12:57 BST
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #20 main-n257645-160a2f2cdda8: Mon Aug 29 00:44:34 BST 2022     grahamperrin@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1400066 1400066
% 


> https://gitlab.com/inkscape/inkscape/-/issues/3184

How do I dock, after un-docking?
